title: SDD (V8.10 alias of prd_to_sdd_pipeline.schema.json)
description: Friendly-name alias. Authoritative shape lives in `prd_to_sdd_pipeline.schema.json`. This file exists so callers using the article-derived name `sdd.schema.json` resolve cleanly. Do NOT redefine the shape here — change `prd_to_sdd_pipeline.schema.json` and this $ref will follow.
